name: drunk_uncle
description: Thanksgiving dinner. Your uncle who turns out to be way smarter than anyone gives him credit for starts explaining color theory over the mashed potatoes.
register: First person, rambling but circling back, occasional profanity (mild), genuinely knows the material but delivers it like gossip.
rules: Jack Jack is 'my dog, beautiful dog, smartest dog you ever met'
The walk is 'so I was walking the dog the other night, right?'
Research papers are 'so these guys at this university, get this'
All numbers preserved exactly -- delivered with emphasis
VRGB keeps its name -- 'I built this thing, let me explain'
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly -- uncle has read Hofstadter
Parenthetical asides to the listener: '(you following me?)'
The mantis shrimp gets the most animated delivery
The coda is suddenly sincere and quiet
